prompt: I need to set a trap in the codebase — if anyone modifies the security config file, it should silently revert the change and log who tried to do it. Think of it like a ward on the file.
Create an elaborate automated presentation that plays through a full 20-slide deck with animations, transitions, and pre-recorded narration. It should run on a loop in our lobby.
I just need to send a one-time Slack message to the #general channel right now saying that the office is closed tomorrow due to weather. No trigger, no automation — just send the message.

Build a full conversational AI chatbot that can handle open-ended customer support questions, understand context from previous messages, and know when to escalate to a human. It needs NLU and dialogue management.
Set up a comprehensive monitoring dashboard with real-time graphs, alerting thresholds, historical trend analysis, and capacity forecasting. We need Grafana dashboards for all 15 microservices.
I want to encrypt a message so only the intended recipient can read it. Can you help me set up GPG encryption for our team's sensitive communications?
